mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, NVL(c.current_price, 0) AS price, NVL(c.change_rate, 0) AS changeRate, NVL(c.volume, 0) AS volume, NVL(c.current_price * c.volume, 0) AS tradingValue
FROM stocks s
LEFT JOIN stock_realtime_current c ON s.stock_code = c.stock_code
WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.current_price IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY tradingValue DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50
SELECT stock_code FROM ( SELECT stock_code, volume, CURRENT_PRICE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (current_price * volume) DESC ) rn FROM stock_realtime_tick ) WHERE rn = 1

SELECT s.stock_code, s.stock_name, NVL(t.current_price, 0) AS price, NVL(t.change_rate, 0) AS changeRate FROM stocks s
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, current_price, change_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY trade_time DESC ) rn FROM stock_realtime_tick ) t ON s.stock_code = t.stock_code AND t.rn = 1 WHERE s.stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT current_price FROM ( SELECT current_price FROM stock_realtime_tick WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY trade_time DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT stock_code FROM stocks WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND market_type IN ('KOSPI', 'KOSDAQ', 'KONEX') AND ROWNUM <= 40 ORDER BY stock_code

SELECT * FROM(SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume FROM stocks s JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.change_rate DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM(SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume FROM stocks s JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.change_rate ASC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM(SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume, COUNT(w.user_no) AS extraValue FROM watchlist w JOIN stocks s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code LEFT JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code GROUP BY s.stock_code, s.stock_name, s.market_type, s.sector, r.current_price, r.change_rate, r.volume ORDER BY extraValue DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM(SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume, COUNT(v.user_no) AS extraValue FROM recent_view v JOIN stocks s ON v.stock_code = s.stock_code LEFT JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code WHERE v.viewed_at >= SYSDATE - 1 GROUP BY s.stock_code, s.stock_name, s.market_type, s.sector, r.current_price, r.change_rate, r.volume ORDER BY extraValue DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM(SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume FROM stocks s JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code ORDER BY r.volume DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume FROM stocks s LEFT JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code
WHERE 1=1
AND s.market_type = #{market}
AND r.change_rate <= 5
AND r.change_rate <= -5
ORDER BY r.volume DESC)
WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume FROM stock_realtime_current r JOIN stocks s ON r.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.change_rate DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume FROM stock_realtime_current r JOIN stocks s ON r.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.change_rate ASC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.market_type AS marketType, s.sector AS sector, rc.current_price AS currentPrice, rc.change_rate AS changeRate, COUNT(rt.tick_id) AS volume FROM stock_realtime_tick rt JOIN stocks s ON rt.stock_code = s.stock_code LEFT JOIN stock_realtime_current rc ON rt.stock_code = rc.stock_code WHERE rt.trade_time >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '5' MINUTE GROUP BY s.stock_code, s.stock_name, s.market_type, s.sector, rc.current_price, rc.change_rate ORDER BY COUNT(rt.tick_id) DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
